//: DS Platform dev-stand — Centrifugo v6 minimal dev config (PORTABLE CONTRACT).
//secrets: Values below are dev-only placeholders, NOT secrets. A recipe needing real keys overrides them via CENTRIFUGO_* env vars (setup-design §4).
//channel: 006 webinar-room chat (EARS-3). The `room` namespace backs the per-event chat channel `room:event:<id>`. Clients are subscribed SERVER-SIDE via the connection token's `channels` claim (the gate-scoped subscribe-only token the api mints), and CANNOT publish (allow_publish_for_client stays false) — every post rides the server-side gated PostChatMessage command over the HTTP API. History is kept so a (re)subscribing client can hydrate recent messages.
